'''√l-g-z''' ('''lagaza''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:machine|machine]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-g-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:machine|machine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √l-g-z
|-
! Lemma
| lagaza
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || lagazithi || lagaziji || lagazishi || lagazi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || lagazuthuth || lagazujuj || lagazushush || lagaz
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || lagazuthu || lagazuju || lagazushu || lagazu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || lagazufuth || lagazufuj || lagazufush || lagazuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || lagazethe || lagazeje || lagazeshe || lagaze
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || lagazothoth || lagazojoj || lagazoshosh || lagaz
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || lagazotho || lagazojo || lagazosho || lagazo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || lagazofoth || lagazofoj || lagazofosh || lagazof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || lagazïf || lagazïf || lagazïf || lagazïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || lagazïfïf || lagazïfïf || lagazïfïf || lagazïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || lagazïf || lagazïf || lagazïf || lagazïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || lagazïf || lagazïf || lagazïf || lagazïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || lagazæthæ || lagazæjæ || lagazæshæ || lagazæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || lagazathath || lagazajaj || lagazashash || lagaz
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || lagazatha || lagazaja || lagazasha || lagaza
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || lagazafath || lagazafaj || lagazafash || lagazaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || lagazasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || golagazasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokilagazasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || lagaznüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || golagaznknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokilagaznüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || lagazshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || golagaznkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokilagazshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || lagazroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || golagaznkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokilagazroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || lagazmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || golagaznkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokilagazmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || lagazsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || golagaznksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokilagazsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || lagazngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || golagaznkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokilagazngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || lagazyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || golagaznkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokilagazyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || lagazyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || golagaznkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokilagazyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || lagaznüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || golagaznknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokilagaznüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || lagaznüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || golagaznknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokilagaznüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || lagaznümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || golagaznknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokilagaznümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || lagazshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || golagaznkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokilagazshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || lagazshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || golagaznkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokilagazshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || lagazshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || golagaznkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokilagazshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || lagazronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || golagaznkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokilagazronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || lagazroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || golagaznkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokilagazroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || lagazromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || golagaznkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokilagazromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || lagazmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || golagaznkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokilagazmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || lagazmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || golagaznkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokilagazmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || lagazmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || golagaznkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokilagazmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || lagaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || lægæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || holagaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || holægæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hoholagaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hoholægæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nülagaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nülægæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünülagaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünülægæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïlagaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïlægæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïlagaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïlægæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || lulagaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || lulægæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || lululagaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lululægæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || lilagaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || lilægæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lililagaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lililægæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kolagaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kolægæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokolagaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokolægæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kelagaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kelægæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekelagaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekelægæz
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
